    Serialized Form

    • Package org.codehaus.plexus.util

      • Class org.codehaus.plexus.util.FastMap

        class FastMap extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialization Methods

          • readObject
            private void readObject(ObjectInputStream stream) throws IOException, ClassNotFoundException
            Requires special handling during de-serialization process.
            Parameters:
            stream - the object input stream.
            Throws:
            IOException - if an I/O error occurs.
            ClassNotFoundException - if the class for the object de-serialized is not found.
          • writeObject
            private void writeObject(ObjectOutputStream stream) throws IOException
            Requires special handling during serialization process.
            Parameters:
            stream - the object output stream.
            Throws:
            IOException - if an I/O error occurs.
